name: Curried Garbanzo Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the garbanzo beans, then soak them overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the beans. In a large pot, combine with enough water to cover, add 1 small finely chopped onion, 4 cloves garlic (minced), 4 cardamom pods (ground), 1 inch piece of ginger (chopped), and 6 cloves. Bring to a boil, then simmer for about an hour or until tender, or pressure cook for 7 minutes at 15 psi.
3. Heat the oil in a pan. Add the remaining thinly sliced onions and fry until they start to brown and dry out. Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
4. Add the cooked beans, mango powder, dried pomegranate seeds, grated ginger (to taste), and simmer over low heat for an additional 15-20 minutes.
5. Before serving, pour about 2 tablespoons of ghee or oil (1 oz) over the beans to serve.
